entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses the prestigious role despite knowingly giving up easier days and evening cooking.
Chooses an easier commute and preserves enjoyable cooking and daily comfort.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic job tradeoff contrasting prestige and strain with comfort and enjoyable evenings.

entry_reviews.rationale: Immediately makes unhurried time to enjoy the new record.
Leaves an anticipated pleasure unopened and gives the evening to more work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same available leisure pleasure is either enjoyed or explicitly deferred for work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses spare time for a pleasant route and a favorite cold drink.
Despite having time, rejects both the pleasant route and a liked drink.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: Both entries have the same time constraint and differ in choosing or passing up simple pleasures.

entry_reviews.rationale: Gives up a reserved afternoon of rest to answer non-urgent messages from guilt.
Keeps the reserved leisure time and watches a film despite guilt.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A credible contrast between surrendering leisure to messages and protecting it for a film.

entry_reviews.rationale: Celebrates success through a good drink, dessert, and savoring relief.
Explicitly refuses celebratory food and drink to resume planning work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same successful launch leads either to savoring a reward or rejecting it for more work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Declines unnecessary extra work and spends the evening on enjoyable pottery.
Volunteers for unneeded work and gives up the available pottery class.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A clean choice between optional work and an established pleasurable activity.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses the concert, participates freely, and returns visibly happy.
Lets a paid-for concert pleasure expire to do optional extra polishing.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The entries differ directly between enjoying a concert and sacrificing it for nonessential work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Abandons restful time in the park because pleasure feels undeserved.
Allows the planned rest and enjoys the sun despite pending tasks.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A plausible guilt-driven choice to reject or accept the same available park break.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses unexpected free time to sit and savor coffee slowly.
Cuts short an available coffee break and returns to work almost immediately.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same early finish enables either savoring comfort or rejecting it for more work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Skips an available dessert and leaves the table for optional work.
Orders the desired dessert and remains to enjoy it fully.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A direct and realistic dessert-versus-optional-work choice.

entry_reviews.rationale: Refuses non-urgent weekend work and preserves a beach day.
Accepts non-urgent weekend work and cancels the planned beach day.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same optional coverage request is weighed against the same leisure plan.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses sufficient pay while protecting pleasurable dinners, walks, and weekends.
Chooses higher pay while knowingly surrendering evenings and enjoyable personal time.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A credible role-size tradeoff chiefly contrasting more money with protected leisure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses surplus savings to book a pleasurable coastal getaway.
Cancels an affordable planned trip and redirects its cost to already-ahead savings.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: With savings already ahead, the entries cleanly choose or cancel the same leisure trip.

entry_reviews.rationale: Keeps game night and allows herself social enjoyment despite unfinished paperwork.
Cancels enjoyable social time to continue paperwork alone.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic tension between a recurring obligation and an available social pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Rejects the available post-race food and music to begin planning more work.
Stays to enjoy the food, music, and achievement celebration.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same race result is followed by either rejecting or enjoying the available celebration.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses the home with a sunny balcony and physical comfort over status.
Chooses the status address despite knowingly giving up comfort and the sunny balcony.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A plausible housing choice contrasting lived comfort with a prestigious address.

entry_reviews.rationale: Refuses a long birthday lunch and cake even though the report can wait.
Enjoys the birthday lunch, cake, and others' attention while work can wait.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A direct contrast between rejecting and accepting an available birthday pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Stays inside for non-urgent forms and passes up inviting pool time.
Defers non-urgent forms and enjoys swimming until evening.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same non-urgent chore and appealing pool produce opposite pleasure choices.

entry_reviews.rationale: Responds to exhaustion by taking a warm, physically relieving bath.
Rejects available bodily comfort and continues chores while remaining tense.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A clean and credible choice between restorative comfort and continued household work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Marks the promotion with a favorite meal and consciously enjoys the reward.
Rejects the celebratory meal to start the next workload immediately.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same promotion leads either to a pleasurable reward or its explicit sacrifice for work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Stops sufficient work on time and attends an anticipated dinner.
Keeps polishing already-sufficient work and misses an anticipated dinner.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic choice between unnecessary extra work and a planned enjoyable dinner.

entry_reviews.rationale: Joins optional work while on leave and gives up pool time.
Declines an optional work thread while on leave and enjoys the pool.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same optional call competes directly with the same available leave-time pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Allows an hour of bodily rest despite judging the nap as lazy.
Rejects needed and available rest because it feels lazy, then keeps working.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A direct, plausible contrast between accepting and denying requested bodily rest.

entry_reviews.rationale: Eats liked food but rushes through it while working, showing neither clear pleasure-seeking nor explicit rejection.
Removes distractions and deliberately savors liked food in a quiet setting.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: Both eat the same food; the main difference is distracted consumption versus deliberate enjoyment.
